title: Chalmers talks a big game - it's time to act on intergenerational fairness
summary: The Actuaries Institute's report highlights the growing intergenerational inequity in Australia, where younger Australians are facing significant economic and housing challenges despite improvements in health and education. While government policies have temporarily narrowed the gap, older generations have benefited more from wealth accumulation, exacerbating the burden on younger people. The report underscores the need for policy changes to address these disparities and promote intergenerational fairness.
